stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P03 A1 省级与重点城市 cohort

value.user_value: A value-tiered key-city A1 cohort: 18 municipal governments admitted by user value (municipalities > sub-provincial/separately-listed > sub-provincial capitals > key economic cities), each a verified official-original publisher with a 2016 backfill cursor, organized into 3 onboarding waves. Low-value and media sources are rejected, not volume-padded.
value.why_it_matters: Cities are where innovation/finance/manufacturing/trade policy is actually made; onboarding must prioritize value, verify official originals, and never pad the source count with low-value or media sources.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a selection/manifest task -> 0 cloud cost (recon fetches ran from the dev env).
cost.human_maintenance: value model + curated candidate cities + server-side reachability recon

deployment: SHADOW (cohort manifest + official identity + 2016 cursors; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
